creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Andrew Pantyukhin wrote:
> Just run "make xpi-plist"  in the port's directory to update
> pkg-plist before generating a diff.  I'm sorry for the poor
> documentation. :(

Whops, I didn't see the plist was committed in a file...
sorry for blindness :P

miwi, the patch to that file is 264 lines and can be generated executing
that simple command... I suppose you would rather execute it than
copy-and-paste it, but just in case you can find it here:
http://lapo.it/firebug-plist.diff
